resources.string: "Blinkit is India's most beloved online grocery shopping platform. Our app is changing the way customers approach their daily essentials. You can now shop online for groceries, fresh fruits and vegetables procured daily, dairy & bakery, beauty & wellness, personal care, household care, diapers & baby care, pet care, meats and seafood as well as the latest products from leading brands like Cadbury, ITC, Colgate-Palmolive, PepsiCo, Aashirvaad, Saffola, Fortune, Nestle, Amul, Dabur, and many more. Imagine if you could get anything delivered to you in minutes. Milk for your morning chai. The perfect shade of lipstick for tonight's party. Even an iPhone. Our superfast delivery service aims to help consumers in India save time and fulfill their needs in a way that is frictionless. We will make healthy, high-quality and life-improving products available to everyone instantly so that people can have time for the things that matter to them. 'Blinkit' is owned & managed by 'Blink Commerce Private Limited' (formerly known as Grofers India Private Limited) and is not related, linked or interconnected in whatsoever manner or nature, to 'GROFFR.COM' which is a real estate services business operated by 'Redstone Consultancy Services Private Limited'."
Double tap to add %1$s to collections
Double tap to remove %1$s from collections
Collection of items, swipe up or down for scrolling the items
Double tap to enter custom tip amount
Your current location is %1$s. Change your delivery location.

swipe up or down to view details or delete order

e.g. ŌĆ£My order is late, rider is not picking up my callsŌĆØ

Tap and hold to record audio message
"Uh-oh, seems like you don't have access to this page."
Failed to load message. Please try again.
"Max %1$d images allowed. Delete excess images to proceed."
You need minimum %1$d images to send. Please add more images to proceed.
Trying to reconnect. Messages may be delayed.
Something went wrong. Check your internet connection.
"<semibold-200|No internet connection> Check your internet connection"
Check your internet connection and retry.
We are facing some issues, please try again in some time or let us know your concern by clicking below.
To record a video message, allow Zync access to your microphone.
To record a voice message, allow Zync access to your microphone.
To record a voice message, allow Zync access to your microphone. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Microphone on.
To record a video message, allow Zync access to your camera and microphone.
Zync requires this permission to enable the in-app camera. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
To capture photos and videos, allow Zync access to your camera.
To capture photos and videos, allow Zync access to your camera. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Camera on.
Zync needs permission to access your phoneŌĆÖs Camera.
It looks like you have turned off permissions required for this feature. It can be enabled under Phone Settings > Apps > Zync > Permissions
To send a nearby place or your location, allow Zync access to your location.
It looks like you have turned off permissions required to share location. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Location on.
"To send media, allow Zync access to your device's photos, media, and files."
"To send media, allow Zync access to your device's photos, media, and files. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Files and media on."
Zync uses this permission to allow you to upload photos from your Gallery. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zync needs permission to access Storage for photo uploads.
We hope we were able to resolve the issue with your order.
ItŌĆÖs us not you, we are looking into fixing this as soon as possible.
Something went wrong, check your internet connection and retry.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
<i><i>This message type is currently not supported<i><i>
Please select an address to import

"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."

New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.

On submit all changes will be applied. (^) Requires app restart. (*) Switching Preprod/Canary logs out. Preprod level changes are applied instantly. Others options apply instantly. Clear app data if you mess up settings.
There are no dialer apps installed.

Transaction failed due to a technical issue at Amazon.
Zomato requires this permission to enable the in-app camera. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs permission to access your phoneŌĆÖs Camera.
This permission enables you to create an account on Zomato using a Google account, or use an existing connection to log in. Are you sure you want to deny Zomato this permission?
It looks like you have turned off permissions required for this feature. It can be enabled under Phone Settings > Apps > Zomato > Permissions
These permissions unlock several features for a better experience.
This permission enables important app features.
Zomato uses this permission to detect your current location and show you great restaurants around you. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs location permission to access this feature.
Zomato uses this permission to record voice. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs permission to access your Microphone to record voice
Background Location ­¤ĢĄ’ĖÅŌĆŹŌÖé’ĖÅ ŌĆö Allow the app to access your location even when the app is not in use. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Location ŌåÆ Allow all the time.
Calendar ­¤ōģ ŌĆö Allow the app to read and modify your calendar. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Calendar and enable it.
Camera ­¤ōĘ ŌĆö Allow the app to take photos or record videos. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Camera and enable it.
Contacts ­¤æź ŌĆö Allow the app to read your contacts. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Contacts and enable it.
File Access ­¤ōé ŌĆö Allow the app to access all files. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ All files access and enable it.
Install Apps ­¤ō▓ ŌĆö Allow the app to install apps from unknown sources. Settings ŌåÆ Install unknown apps and enable it.
Location ­¤ōŹ ŌĆö Allow the app to access your deviceŌĆÖs location. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Location and enable it.
Microphone ­¤Äż ŌĆö Allow the app to record audio. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Microphone and enable it.
Notifications ­¤öö ŌĆö Allow the app to send notifications. Settings ŌåÆ Notifications and enable it.
Overlay ­¤¢╝’ĖÅ ŌĆö Allow the app to display content over other apps. Settings ŌåÆ Display over other apps and enable it.
Phone ŌśÄ’ĖÅ ŌĆö Allow the app to read phone status and identity. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Phone and enable it.
Call Access ­¤ō× ŌĆö Allow the app to make and manage phone calls. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Phone and enable it.
SMS ­¤Æī ŌĆö Allow the app to send and read SMS messages. Permissions ŌåÆ Settings ŌåÆ SMS and enable it.
Storage ­¤ÆŠ ŌĆö Allow the app to read and write files. Settings ŌåÆ Permissions ŌåÆ Storage and enable it.
System Settings ŌÜÖ’ĖÅ ŌĆö Allow the app to modify system settings. Settings ŌåÆ Modify system settings and enable it.
Enable for a better delivery experience
Zomato uses this permission to call restaurants directly without you having to leave the app. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs permission to access your Phone to make calls.
Zomato uses this permission to allow you to choose contact for whom you wish to order. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs permission to access your Contacts to pick one for whom you wish to order.
Storage permission is required to download the file. Would you like to grant permission?
Go to Settings ŌåÆ Enable the required permissions.
Go to Settings ŌåÆ %1$s ŌåÆ Enable it.
Some permissions are disabled. Enable them in settings for the best experience.
Zomato uses this permission to allow you to upload photos from your Gallery. Are you sure you want to deny this permission?
Zomato needs permission to access Storage for photo uploads.
Zomato needs permission to access Storage for this action.
